title: Dimensional Totem
body:
# Dimensional Totem 
Totem to get into dimensions
## Description
Simple mod which forces people to have specific totem to enter dimensions!
### How to get the totem?
To create totem for specific dimension, you need set nbt field `dimension` to id of the dimension you want. \
(Example: `/give @s dimtotem:dimensional_totem{dimension:"the_nether"}`)
### Dependiences
- Required: IvyCore
- Optional: LevelZ
### Config
You can find config files in `dimtotem` folder in `config` folder!
